results.title: Emma Raducanu immediately signs up for two tournaments after crashing out of French Open
results.description: Emma Raducanu was dumped out of the French Open on the very first day.

results.title: Was Chelsea's Fofana unlucky to see red at Sunderland?'
results.description: Was Chelsea defender Wesley Fofana unlucky to see yellow for the second time as he was sent off in their 2-1 defeat at Sunderland.
